commentaries.author: Epiphanius of Cyprus
commentaries.content: 1 Corinthians 11:8 For the man is not of the woman; but the woman of the man. Epiphanius of Cyprus For even if women among them [the Montanists] are appointed to the office of bishop and presbyter by appealing to Eve, they hear the Lord saying: “Your resort shall be to your husband, and he shall rule over you. ” And the apostolic word has also escaped their notice: “I do not permit a woman to teach in such a way as to exercise authority over men. She is to preserve the virtue of quietness. ” And again, “For man is not from woman, but woman from man.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: But if to be of any one, is a glory to him of whom one is, much more the being an image of him.
